overview: Frost Demon is a SubBoss-class Demon monster found in Ice Abyss. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 700 HP, 0 physical damage, 75 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 999, MaxImpactEndurance 999. 2 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: at 150% ratio (0 base damage). Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilityy: Self Heal.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: High Impact Values (ImpactRes 999, Endurance 999)
strategies.description: ImpactResistance 999 and MaxImpactEndurance 999. This monster does not have a Staggered ability in its ability set.

strategies.title: Elemental Weaknesses: Fire, Light, Divine
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Fire (-2000), Light (-2000), Divine (-2000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Resists: Ice
strategies.description: Elemental resistances: Ice (+500). Positive reduction values reduce incoming damage of that type.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 200
strategies.description: Has 200 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Self Heal
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 1 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Self Heal. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 200 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster
Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilities: Self Heal

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.stuck_description: Has stuck-detection failsafes in behavior tree.
